reviews.comment:
Arreglan muy bien los autos, pero te lo usan para descansar. Cuando lo retire estaba la butaca reclinada tipo reposera, el aire acondicionado prendido y el tanque casi sin nafta

(Translated by Google)
They fix up cars really well, but they use them to relax. When I picked it up, the seat was reclined like a lounge chair, the air conditioning was on, and the gas tank was almost empty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReHV1Y2RREAE

reviews.comment:
Con un problema simple en una cubierta fuimos a la sede central y a la sede de Godoy Cruz y no nos atendieron.  Parece que el cliente no importa aunque pague

(Translated by Google)
With a simple problem with a tire, we went to both the main office and the Godoy Cruz branch, and no one helped us. It seems the customer doesn't matter, even if they pay.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeXB2TVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Te cobran el doble de lo que vale en cualquier otro lado, pero tenés casi todo en el mismo lugar.

(Translated by Google)
They charge you double what it costs anywhere else, but you have almost everything in the same place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMGQyUHB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mal hecho, hay que hacer fila en la calle parado en doble fila. No recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Very poorly done; you have to queue in the street, double-parked. I don't recommend it.
